description: The food.gdt dataset is open in Gretl, containing household survey data for 'food_exp' (weekly food expenditure) and 'income' (weekly income). Create a new variable named 'l_food_exp' that is the natural log of 'food_exp'. Save the modified dataset to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/food_with_log.gdt.

metadata.data_source: Hill, Griffiths, Lim - Principles of Econometrics 5th ed, household survey data
